title: Bat window sticker pack (Option 1) - 2 sheets | Halloween window stickers | Perfect for decorating your home this Autumn for Halloween
features: 🎃 SPOOKY HALLOWEEN WINDOW STICKERS - Decorate your home this Halloween with our mixed bat window stickers. Includes 28 bat window stickers in total, ranging from 22cm x 10cm for the largest bat to 6cm x 4cm for the smallest bat.
✔️ QUICK AND EASY TO APPLY - Stickerscape's window stickers are super easy to apply - simply peel and stick. It's so easy even children can help with too (remember they are also repositionable!).
🔁 REUSABLE YEAR AFTER YEAR - With an ultra-low tack spot adhesive our window stickers can be reused. Simply place the stickers back on the backing sheet and store them when you need them next.
💂 MADE IN THE UK - We are passionate about British made products. All our window stickers are made in-house, by us, in the UK. This ensures the highest quality of product time and time again.
👶 CHILD FRIENDLY - We use only water based, child friendly, inks during the print process. This ensures all our window stickers are child friendly with no nasty fumes when your stickers arrive.
description: From the manufacturer Halloween window stickers Stickerscape's collection of Halloween window stickers are perfect for decorating your home this October. Featuring Haunted Houses, bats, spiders, ghosts and much more! Easy to apply, removable, repositionable and re-usable year after year with lots of designs to choose from! Introducing the Halloween collection Our collection of Halloween window stickers includes a wide range of designs perfect for decorating your home this Halloween. Perfect for children's bedrooms, nurseries, kitchens and living rooms our Halloween window stickers collection include a variety of different designs. Haunted villages, ghosts, spiders, bats and much more - we're sure you'll find something you'll love in our collection. The collection is also designed to suit a range of different age ranges. From cute and fun designs for younger children to scarier designs for older children. All our wall stickers are made by us in the UK. Using water based child friendly inks, all our window stickers are self-adhesive, cleanly removable, re-positionable and re-usable. High quality self-adhesive window stickers made in the UK Lots of designs available Here at Stickerscape we are passionate about design. Our team have created a collection of over 30 different Halloween designs so we're sure you'll find something you'll just love. To see the whole collection simply search "Stickerscape Halloween window stickers" or take a little in our store. Easy to apply Frustrated by static cling not staying on the window? All our window stickers are self-adhesive and come with a unique low-tack adhesive on the backing. This makes them easy to apply - simply peel and stick. It's also great for decorating with young children as they can also help - it really is that easy! Repositionable and reusable Our window stickers have a unique 'spot' adhesive. This means they can be removed and re-positioned on your window without leaving any sticky residue. They also reusable year after year. Simply keep the backing sheet your window stickers arrive on. Once you are done with your stickers, simply remove your window stickers and place back on the backing sheet. Roll up the sheet (with the graphics on the outside) and store safely for next year! Made in the UK Our team at Stickerscape are based in the UK and everything we sell is made by us. This ensures consistent high quality products. About Stickerscape At Stickerscape we make gorgeous, high-quality decor items to decorate children's rooms. Our wall and window stickers can give any nursery, bedroom or playroom a super-speedy makeover and transform plain walls into fun backgrounds for exciting, imaginative play. Our product range now also includes roller blinds, school name labels and even some gift products, all produced to the same high-quality in the UK. Proudly manufacturing in the UK, we produce all our products at our Hampshire base, which means that we're more than happy to take on bespoke commissions or personalise designs to ensure that you get a finished result that's perfect for your space and family. And for mums and dads, it's good to know that all our wall stickers are made from the highest quality materials which will remove cleanly (without damaging the paintwork!) when the time comes for a change. And with loads of designs and themes to choose from, we hope you will always be spoilt for choice.
